headline: Iran War GASPS 💨🛢️ Inflation to 3.8% 😱📈 PUMPED!
text:
US 💸🇺🇸 INFLATION 🤑📈 JUMPED 🚀 to THICC 3.8% 😩💦 – highest since May 2023 📅🔥 cuz IRAN WAR 💣🕌 SLAMMING 🥊 energy costs like a Middle East MIC DROP 🎤💥! Consumers FEELING the BURN 🔥😰 as GASOLINE 🛢️🍆 surges to $4.50/gallon 💰🚗 – national average PEAKING 📈 since July 2022, THX AAA 📊👀 for the PAIN TRAIN 🚂😭! Strait of Hormuz 🚫🌊 SHUT DOWN 🔒 by US-Israel BOMBS 💣🇮🇱🇮🇷, oil PRICES MOONING 🌙🛢️ and pumping CPI 📊🍑 to 3.8% YoY – HALF from ENERGY BRRRRR 💨🤑, housing 🏠 and GROCERIES 🥐🍌 also SPIKING 🥵!

BLS 📈🕵️ spilling TEA ☕: Food + Housing TAG-TEAMING 👯‍♂️ the wallet WALLOP 💥, while Trump 🍊👨‍💼's FED DADDY Jerome Powell 😴📉 gets YEETED 🚫 for Kevin Warsh 🧔💼 – incoming CHAIRMAN 👑 with ZERO wiggle room 😩🔒! Trump CLASHED 🤼‍♂️ with Powell over rate CUTS ✂️💰 to JUICE economy 🍹🚀, now Warsh gotta DELIVER or get DRILLED 🛢️😤 – but INFLATION SURGE 🚀 makes HIKES 📈 'FIRMLY ON TABLE' per Isaac Stell 🤓💸! No cuts this year bby 👶📉, FED simping HARD for HAWKS 🦅😠!

BAD VIBES 😢📉 for Trump + GOP 🐘 ahead of MIDTERMS 🗳️🍑 – his 2024 RE-ELECT 🍊🔥 CAMPAIGN was ALL 'SLAY INFLATION 🗡️📉' but now PAYCHECKS 💼📈 at 3.6% LAGGING prices 3.8% 😭💸 – first time in 3 YEARS Americans ain't outrunning PRICES 🏃‍♂️💨! Air fares ✈️💸 + CLOTHING 👕🤑 UP, new CARS 🚗📉 dipped a tease 😏. Wall Street CUCKS 🐔📉: S&P 500 -0.6% 😢📉, Dow -0.7% 🥺 – markets DUMPING 🚽 like post-Iran oil ORGY 💦🛢️!

Trump's like 'HOLD MY BIG MAC 🍔🍊' tryna RATE-CUT RALLY 📈 but Iran WAR HAWKS 🦅💣 got GAS PRICES PUMPING 🍆🛢️ harder than Elon’s Cybertruck 🚀😩! Fed's in a CHOKEHOLD 🤼‍♂️, consumers CRYING 😭💳 at pumps, and INFLATION DADDY 👑📈 back to SLAY – no EASE for wallet WOES 💸😰! Warsh incoming like 'Time to HAWK MODE 🦅📈' while Powell packs 👋😴 – MIDTERMS MELTDOWN incoming? 🍑💥📉‼️
